name: Electronic Mouse Teaser Cat Toy - Boots & Barkley™ Assorted Pink
description:
Engage your feline friend in energetic play with this Electronic Mouse Teaser Cat Toy from Boots & Barkley™. This electronic mouse toy is designed in shiny pink and is controlled by the included remote, which requires three LR44 alkaline batteries (included). Sure to get them chasing and pouncing, it makes a great pick for cats of all ages.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
